# Phase-18 — FinOps, Observability & Reliability

> Run data and AI platforms cost-efficiently and reliably in production.
>
> Suggested timeline: **Weeks 64-66**

Each prompt below instructs GitHub Copilot to generate exactly one standalone Markdown
chapter with all 50 mandatory sections (Azure-primary, ~60/30/10 Azure/OSS/AWS+GCP).

| # | Prompt | Generates | Study time |
|---|--------|-----------|------------|
| 01 | [FinOps and Cost Optimization](01_FinOps_and_Cost_Optimization.prompt.md) | `FinOps_and_Cost_Optimization.md` | 60 min + 3h |
| 02 | [Observability with OpenTelemetry](02_Observability_with_OpenTelemetry.prompt.md) | `Observability_OpenTelemetry.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 03 | [Monitoring with Prometheus and Grafana](03_Monitoring_with_Prometheus_and_Grafana.prompt.md) | `Monitoring_Prometheus_Grafana.md` | 60 min + 3h |
| 04 | [Reliability and SRE](04_Reliability_and_SRE.prompt.md) | `Reliability_and_SRE.md` | 60 min + 3h |
| 05 | [Performance Engineering](05_Performance_Engineering.prompt.md) | `Performance_Engineering.md` | 60 min + 4h |

## How to run
Open a prompt file in VS Code and run it with GitHub Copilot (agent mode), or reference it
from Copilot Chat. It will produce the corresponding `.md` chapter listed above.
